page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: HIST291 or JWST231.

JWST233 Why the Jews? Historical and Cultural Investigations (3 Credits)

Examines the history and culture of the Jews from the thirteenth century BCE/BC to the present through an examination of significant themes or problems (such as "religion" or "diaspora”) that shape our understanding of the Jewish people. A primary focus in the course will be on texts, artifacts, and other cultural products by Jews and others that illustrate the history of the Jews help understand their cultural heritage. Restriction: Must not have completed HIST282, HIST283, JWST234, or JWST235. Cross-listed with HIST287.

Credit Only Granted for. JWST233 or HIST287.
